title: Finn Meets the Savanna Friends
synopsis: Little Finn explores the warm savanna and meets friendly animals who teach him their sounds and movements in this gentle introduction to African wildlife.

pages.text: Finn walks in the warm grass. The sun is big and orange.

illustration.description: A gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing a small boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes walking through golden savanna grass under an orange sunset sky, painted in warm colors with bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Finn walking through golden savanna grass

pages.text: Look! A big elephant says hello. Trumpet! Trumpet!

illustration.description: A textured painterly gouache scene with thick brushstrokes showing an expressive elephant trumpeting next to a small boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes, painted in warm savanna colors with golden grass and orange sunset tones

pages.text: A tall giraffe bends down. Finn reaches up high!

illustration.description: A gouache painting with bold confident strokes depicting a spotted giraffe bending its long neck down toward a small boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes reaching upward, set against warm savanna colors and golden grass
illustration.alt: Finn reaching up to touch a giraffe

pages.text: Roar! A friendly lion family plays in the sun.

illustration.description: An expressive gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing a lion family playing together while a small boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes watches nearby, painted in textured painterly style with warm savanna colors and orange sunset light
illustration.alt: Finn watching a lion family play

pages.text: Finn waves goodbye to all his new friends. What a fun day!

illustration.description: A gouache painting with bold confident strokes showing a small boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes waving goodbye to elephant, giraffe, and lions in the distance, painted with thick brushstrokes in warm savanna colors with golden grass under an orange sunset
illustration.alt: Finn waving goodbye to savanna animals

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What sound does the elephant make?
questions.explanation: Elephants make a trumpeting sound with their trunks!

questions.question: Which animal is very tall?
questions.explanation: Giraffes are the tallest animals in the world!

questions.question: What color is the sun in the story?
questions.explanation: The sun is big and orange in the savanna sky!
